requirement_title: 2FA verify with valid TOTP after tmpToken
title: TOTP required and valid token submitted leads to login success
precondition: System is in totp_token_required state (valid tmpToken exists)
test_steps: Submit a POST request to /rest/2fa/verify with a valid TOTP token

requirement_title: 2FA verify with valid TOTP after tmpToken
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: TOTP token is verified successfully and the user is logged in.

requirement_title: 2FA verify with valid TOTP after tmpToken
title: Valid TOTP token leads to successful login
precondition: User has initiated login and system responded with totp_token_required indicating TOTP is needed
test_steps:
Generate a valid TOTP token using the user's shared secret
Submit a POST request to /rest/2fa/verify with the valid token in the totp_token field
expected_result: Server verifies the token, completes the login process, and returns a success response with authentication tokens/session.
